message:
feat(policy): add hash-linked audit chain for tamper-evident policy trail

SHA-256 hash-linked audit chain with bounded retention, tamper detection,
chain verification, and JSONL/JSON export. Covers policy decisions,
quarantine actions, kill-switch events, and compliance violations.
25 unit tests including tamper detection and eviction behavior.

Precursor for ft-3681t.6.4/ft-3681t.6.5 forensics and governance.

Bead: ft-23ywx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"ft-23sl2","title":"Add property-based tests for runtime_compat dual-runtime abstraction layer","description":"Add proptest coverage for runtime_compat.rs — the critical dual-runtime compat layer bridging tokio↔asupersync migration. This module has 100+ inline unit tests but zero property-based testing. Properties to verify: MPSC channel FIFO ordering, watch channel latest-value semantics, semaphore permit accounting invariants, mutex/rwlock data integrity across lock/unlock cycles, RuntimeBuilder builder pattern, timeout/spawn_blocking correctness. Directly supports wa-1bznu validation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AmberCreek","created_at":"2026-02-15T20:10:59.091740Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-15T21:31:46.203574Z","closed_at":"2026-02-15T21:31:46.203562Z","close_reason":"Implemented runtime_compat proptests (MPSC FIFO, watch latest-value, semaphore permits, mutex/rwlock invariants, timeout and spawn_blocking); lib check passes via rch; lib-test build currently blocked by pre-existing duplicate test function in resize_scheduler.rs","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-23sl2","depends_on_id":"ft-1bznu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-23T00:14:26Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"ft-24l8","title":"[EPIC] FTUI-07 Test, Quality, and CI Gate Migration","description":"## Purpose
Establish migration-specific test gates, artifact standards, and CI enforcement.

## Why
A UI migration without strict quality gates will drift and become impossible to trust.

## Focus
- unit and snapshot coverage for ftui views
- PTY E2E for lifecycle/input/resize/log stress
- perf budgets and regression gates

 {"id":"ft-24shg","title":"Integrate rano — network attribution subprocess bridge","description":"## rano Integration (Wave 1)

Create `network_observer.rs` behind `network-observer` feature gate.

### What to Build
1. `network_observer.rs`: SubprocessBridge wrapping the `rano` CLI
2. Functions:
   - attribute_connection(remote_addr: &str) -> NetworkAttribution
   - check_connectivity() -> ConnectivityStatus
3. Types: NetworkAttribution { provider, region, latency_ms, is_trusted }
4. Backpressure mapping: high latency or unreachable → Yellow/Red tier
5. Feature gate: `network-observer`

### Unit Tests (30+)
- test_attribution_parses_provider
- test_attribution_parses_region
- test_connectivity_check_passes
- test_connectivity_check_fails_gracefully
- test_backpressure_green_low_latency
- test_backpressure_yellow_high_latency
- test_fail_open_when_rano_unavailable
- (+ 23 more)

### Logging
- debug!(bridge = "rano", remote = %addr, provider = %prov, latency_ms = %lat)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"IndigoReef","estimated_minutes":180,"created_at":"2026-02-22T07:25:45.499643Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-02-22T08:01:53.376850Z","closed_at":"2026-02-22T08:01:53.376804Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["integration","network","subprocess"]}
